title: Consult | Your Name
description: A generic consulting or collaboration page for the starter template.
heroTitle: Create a page for collaboration, advising, or exploratory calls
heroText: This page works well when you want to explain who the conversation is for, what good fit looks like, and how you prefer to work.

cards.title: Who this is for
cards.text: Use this card to describe the kinds of people, teams, or problems that tend to match your strengths.

cards.title: What people can bring
cards.text: Explain whether the page is for planning, sense-making, role discussions, portfolio reviews, or open-ended conversations.

cards.title: What happens next
cards.text: Set expectations clearly: a short call, written follow-up, project scoping, or a simple decision about fit.

cards.title: What a good fit looks like
cards.text: Use this area to be specific about boundaries so the page feels professional and reassuring.
